option.name: originalContent
option.value:
from django.contrib import admin from django.urls import path from . import views
urlpatterns = [ path("", views.quotes, name="quotes"), ]

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
from django.contrib import admin from django.urls import path from . import views
urlpatterns = [ path("", views.quotes, name="quotes"), path("quotes/", views.quotes, name="quotes_page"), ]

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
